verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I look at my brothers They live by faith alone They want no compromise On what the Lord desires For the sake of Christ They have chosen to live the harder Way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I’m choosing the harder Way Whatsoever people around me say If shame may mock me and laugh Though the road may seem so tough If in the harder Way there you abide Then help me God there I’ll reside In the harder Way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I look at my sisters They look too old-fashioned They stay in their right place They speak with Godly things Stand for what is right They forsake all to live the harder way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I want to win You Lord Though it means a loss of this world I just cannot live without You So I’m taking the Harder Way
